name_cn:
Milk Tea Color·
SOLFERINO BOX_19cm
A must-have bestseller that has conquered the entire fashion world upon release. Nostalgic Left Bank, inspired by the Rue De Solferino in Paris! The bag uses original factory fine toothpick texture Box cowhide, offering excellent texture and flexibility! The interior features a three-layer accordion pocket, easily accommodating daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter top-half opening clasp completely redefines your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim in amazement—bags can actually open like this, it's simply too fun!
Model: 634306
Size: 19x13x5cm
